codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and well-structured. All 9 expected endpoints from expectedBehavior are implemented. The code follows the repository/service/router pattern correctly. Models have proper unique constraints on (user_id, lesson_id) for Bookmark and LessonProgress. Tests cover authentication requirements and UUID validation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker created a 'syllabus' module at apps/api/internal/syllabus/ but AGENTS.md architecture shows the content module should be at apps/api/internal/content/. The worker created a new module instead of using the existing content/ module as documented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md lists 'content/ | Subjects, topics, lessons' but worker created apps/api/internal/syllabus/ instead. The handoff states 'whatWasImplemented: Created full syllabus module' rather than adding to content module.

summary: Feature syllabus-module passes review. All 9 expected API endpoints are implemented and working. Code quality is good with proper async patterns, Pydantic validation, and authentication checks. One non-blocking observation: worker created a 'syllabus' module instead of using the 'content' module as documented in AGENTS.md - this is a naming deviation but not a functional issue since the module works correctly.
